heroHeadline: October 2, 1968: Army Opens Fire on Students at Tlatelolco
heroSubtitle: 21,017 days since the massacre — in 2024 Sheinbaum issued the first state apology; the true death toll (200–400), fate of the disappeared, and full accountability remain unresolved
footerNote: Data sourced from declassified CIA/NSA documents, Archivo General de la Nación (AGN), FEMOSPP investigation reports, CNDH, and major outlets including Proceso, La Jornada, and the National Security Archive.
